description: TaxMate Australia helps prepare Australian individual tax return materials with official ATO source links, GST/BAS and CGT review support, conservative boundaries, and clear review flags.

defaultPrompt: Help me prepare my Australian individual tax return materials for accountant review.
interface.longDescription: TaxMate Australia prepares Australian individual tax return materials for review before myTax, paper ATO form, or accountant handoff. It combines ATO source-page refresh, GST/BAS and CGT review support, calculator scaffolds, missing-evidence queues, and output-focused skills on a bash and Python runtime. It supports Codex and Claude Code plugin workflows plus portable skill use in Cowork and OpenAgentSkill CLI. It is a preparation aid, not professional tax, legal, accounting, financial, BAS-agent, or registered-tax-agent advice, and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Australian Taxation Office.
interface.shortDescription: Australian tax prep with ATO source links

name: taxmate-australia

safety.noLodgmentBoundary: Never lodge, file, submit, transmit, or finalise any tax return, BAS, form, statement, objection, election, payment instruction, or other material with the ATO or any government agency.
